mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team (name, description, creator_id, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{creatorId}, #{status})
INSERT INTO team_member ( team_id, user_id, role, join_time ) VALUES ( #{teamId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{joinTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM team WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT t.* FROM team t INNER JOIN team_member tm ON t.id = tm.team_id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE team SET name = #{name}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.avatar_url, tm.role, tm.join_time FROM team_member tm INNER JOIN user u ON tm.user_id = u.id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY tm.join_time ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}
